gaps.detectionLogic: I48.x + CHA2DS2-VASc>=2 men or >=3 women without OAC
gaps.name: AF: Anticoagulation gap (CHA2DS2-VASc qualifying)
gaps.structuredDataElements: AF dx + CHA2DS2-VASc components (HF, HTN, age, DM, stroke/TIA, vasc, sex)

gaps.detectionLogic: Dabigatran + severe renal impairment
gaps.name: AF: Dabigatran in CrCl<30 (SAFETY)

gaps.detectionLogic: DOAC + Z95.2 or mechanical valve history
gaps.name: AF: DOAC on mechanical valve (CRITICAL SAFETY)

gaps.detectionLogic: DOAC + I05.0/I34.2 moderate-severe MS
gaps.name: AF: DOAC on moderate-severe mitral stenosis

gaps.detectionLogic: OAC e-prescribed but zero pharmacy fills
gaps.name: AF: OAC prescribed but not filled (primary non-adherence)
gaps.structuredDataElements: E-Rx orders vs pharmacy claim fills

gaps.detectionLogic: Proportion of days covered <80% in past 12mo
gaps.name: AF: OAC adherence PDC<80% on chronic fills
gaps.structuredDataElements: Pharmacy claim fill data with days-supply

gaps.detectionLogic: On warfarin with INR TTR<65% - DOAC switch
gaps.name: AF: Warfarin with TTR<65%

gaps.detectionLogic: DOAC dose not matching CrCl-adjusted recommendation
gaps.name: AF: DOAC dose inappropriate for CrCl

gaps.detectionLogic: Age>=80, wt<=60kg, Cr>=1.5 present but on 5 mg BID (should be 2.5)
gaps.name: AF: Apixaban dose reduction criteria missed

gaps.detectionLogic: On 2.5 mg BID without >=2 reduction criteria
gaps.name: AF: Apixaban under-dosing (2.5 BID without criteria)

gaps.detectionLogic: Edoxaban + CrCl>95
gaps.name: AF: Edoxaban with CrCl>95 (reduced efficacy)

gaps.detectionLogic: AF + recent PCI on OAC + DAPT beyond 1-6 mo per AUGUSTUS/PIONEER
gaps.name: AF: Triple therapy duration gap post-PCI
gaps.structuredDataElements: AF, PCI date, DAPT components, OAC

gaps.detectionLogic: Rivaroxaban prescribed - must be taken with food
gaps.name: AF: Rivaroxaban food counseling

gaps.detectionLogic: AF + HAS-BLED high + documented OAC contraindication without LAAC referral
gaps.name: LAAC: bleeding contraindication to OAC
gaps.structuredDataElements: AF, bleeding hx, OAC hold reason, LAAC

gaps.detectionLogic: CHA2DS2-VASc>=3 + prior major bleed without LAAC discussion
gaps.name: LAAC: high CHA2DS2-VASc + bleed history

gaps.detectionLogic: LAAC with non-standard post-procedure antithrombotic regimen
gaps.name: Post-LAAC: antithrombotic protocol adherence

gaps.detectionLogic: LAAC without follow-up TEE
gaps.name: Post-LAAC: TEE surveillance at 45d-1y gap

gaps.detectionLogic: LAAC with PDL>5mm on TEE without anticoagulation reassessment
gaps.name: LAAC peridevice leak >5mm: management gap

gaps.detectionLogic: AF diagnosis within 12 months without rhythm control strategy
gaps.name: Early rhythm control candidate (EAST-AFNET 4)
gaps.structuredDataElements: AF onset date, AAD meds, ablation

gaps.detectionLogic: AF + LVEF<=35 without ablation referral
gaps.name: AF ablation in HFrEF (CASTLE-AF)

gaps.detectionLogic: HFrEF on verapamil/diltiazem
gaps.name: AF + non-DHP CCB in HFrEF (SAFETY)

gaps.detectionLogic: Device-detected AHRE>=24h + CHA2DS2-VASc>=2
gaps.name: Subclinical AF: AHRE>=24h without anticoag eval

gaps.detectionLogic: Paroxysmal AF symptomatic despite AAD
gaps.name: Symptomatic paroxysmal AF - ablation candidate

gaps.detectionLogic: Recent cardioversion without 4+ weeks post-procedure OAC
gaps.name: Post-cardioversion anticoagulation duration gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Paroxysmal AF ablation candidate + pulmonary vein anatomy amenable
gaps.name: PFA ablation candidacy (pulsed field)

gaps.detectionLogic: Post-AF ablation with CHA2DS2-VASc qualifying but OAC stopped at 3mo
gaps.name: Post-ablation anticoagulation continuation gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Prior AF ablation + recurrent AF symptoms at >3mo without redo discussion
gaps.name: Redo ablation consideration in recurrent AF

gaps.detectionLogic: Surgical AF + cardiac surgery without concomitant Maze documented
gaps.name: Concomitant Maze at cardiac surgery with AF
gaps.structuredDataElements: AF, cardiac surgery CPT, Maze CPT

gaps.detectionLogic: I63.9 cryptogenic stroke without ICM or 30-day monitor
gaps.name: Cryptogenic stroke: ICM not implanted

gaps.detectionLogic: WPW + AF on beta-blocker/CCB/digoxin - risk of VF
gaps.name: Pre-excited AF: AV nodal blocker contraindicated (CRITICAL)
gaps.structuredDataElements: WPW dx, AF dx, AV nodal blocker

gaps.detectionLogic: I48.3 typical flutter + symptomatic without CTI ablation offered
gaps.name: Typical atrial flutter: CTI ablation candidate

gaps.detectionLogic: Recurrent focal AT symptomatic on AAD without ablation
gaps.name: Focal atrial tachycardia recurrent: ablation gap

gaps.detectionLogic: AVNRT diagnosis recurrent without ablation option discussed
gaps.name: AVNRT recurrent symptomatic: ablation offered

gaps.detectionLogic: AVRT dx without ablation
gaps.name: AVRT with concealed bypass tract: ablation

gaps.detectionLogic: WPW pattern on ECG in pilot/athlete without risk stratification
gaps.name: WPW asymptomatic in high-risk occupation: EP study gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Athletes with ECG abnormalities without exercise + imaging workup
gaps.name: Athlete's heart vs pathology: exercise stress + imaging gap

gaps.detectionLogic: VT storm (>=3 sustained VT/24h) without escalation protocol
gaps.name: VT storm: admission + sedation + ablation protocol
gaps.structuredDataElements: VT storm pattern, ICU admission, ablation

gaps.detectionLogic: Ischemic heart disease + VT on AAD without ablation offered
gaps.name: Ischemic VT: catheter ablation consideration
gaps.structuredDataElements: CAD dx, VT dx, AAD, ablation

gaps.detectionLogic: NICM + monomorphic VT without EP study
gaps.name: NICM VT: substrate mapping/ablation gap
gaps.structuredDataElements: NICM dx, VT dx, EP study

gaps.detectionLogic: Ischemic VT + ICD shocks on AAD without ablation offered
gaps.name: VT ablation before amiodarone escalation (VANISH)
gaps.structuredDataElements: VT, ICD therapy log, AAD, ablation

gaps.detectionLogic: Ischemic VT + failed endocardial ablation without epicardial approach
gaps.name: Epicardial VT substrate: access planning

gaps.detectionLogic: Refractory VT storm without SGB evaluation
gaps.name: Stellate ganglion block for refractory VT storm

gaps.detectionLogic: ICD shock appropriateness review not documented after therapy
gaps.name: Inappropriate ICD shocks: programming optimization

gaps.detectionLogic: ECG type 1 Brugada pattern without formal diagnosis
gaps.name: Brugada syndrome diagnosis gap

gaps.detectionLogic: LQTS (I49.81 or genetic) without beta-blocker
gaps.name: LQTS: beta-blocker gap

gaps.detectionLogic: QTc>=500 on QT-prolonging drug without discontinuation
gaps.name: Acquired LQT on QT-prolonging drug (SAFETY)
gaps.structuredDataElements: QTc, QT drug list (amiodarone, dronedarone, sotalol, methadone, etc.)

gaps.detectionLogic: LQTS dx + QT-prolonging drug prescribed
gaps.name: Congenital LQTS: QT-prolonging drug avoidance gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Confirmed Brugada + syncope or FHx SCD without ICD
gaps.name: SCN5A-mediated Brugada: device decision
gaps.structuredDataElements: Brugada dx, syncope, FHx, ICD status

gaps.detectionLogic: CPVT dx without nadolol or flecainide added
gaps.name: CPVT: beta-blocker + flecainide consideration

gaps.detectionLogic: LQT1 on propranolol instead of nadolol
gaps.name: LQT1 genotype specific: BB choice (nadolol preferred)

gaps.detectionLogic: LQT2 genotype + auditory/postpartum triggers not counseled
gaps.name: LQT2 trigger identification counseling gap

gaps.detectionLogic: LQT3 (SCN5A gain-of-function) without mexiletine evaluated
gaps.name: LQT3 mexiletine eligibility

gaps.detectionLogic: SQTS diagnosis without quinidine evaluated
gaps.name: Short QT syndrome: quinidine consideration

gaps.detectionLogic: ERS + VF survivor without ICD or quinidine
gaps.name: Early repolarization syndrome post-VF: ICD + quinidine
gaps.structuredDataElements: ERS dx, VF hx, ICD, quinidine

gaps.detectionLogic: Complete AV block, symptomatic SB, sinus node dysfunction - pacer indicated
gaps.name: Pacemaker Class I indication not implanted
gaps.structuredDataElements: AV block dx, sinus node dx, device status

gaps.detectionLogic: Bradyarrhythmia + AV nodal blocker before pacer decision
gaps.name: Symptomatic bradycardia on AV nodal blocker: med reduction first

gaps.detectionLogic: Recurrent vasovagal syncope without tilt or ILR
gaps.name: Vasovagal syncope recurrent: tilt or ILR

gaps.detectionLogic: Single chamber RV pacemaker with >=40% pacing and HF symptoms
gaps.name: Pacemaker syndrome from RV pacing >=40%: upgrade discussion

gaps.detectionLogic: AF + awake HR<40 on meds without meds first, then pacer
gaps.name: Chronic AF with HR<40: permanent pacing vs med adjustment

gaps.detectionLogic: CIED + BSI without extraction planning
gaps.name: Isolated left-sided CIED infection: full system removal

gaps.detectionLogic: Post-AVR complete AV block or symptomatic without pacer
gaps.name: Post-AVR (surgical or TAVR) conduction: pacer indication
gaps.structuredDataElements: AVR procedure, AV block dx, device status

gaps.detectionLogic: Single chamber pacer indication without leadless option discussed
gaps.name: Leadless pacemaker candidate (AV block + single chamber)

gaps.detectionLogic: Pacer indication with expected >=40% pacing - LBBAP preferred
gaps.name: LBBAP (left bundle branch area pacing) consideration

gaps.detectionLogic: Device on recall list without acknowledged follow-up plan
gaps.name: CIED recall: patient notification and follow-up

gaps.detectionLogic: Abandoned lead in situ without periodic surveillance
gaps.name: CIED abandoned lead: infection risk discussion

gaps.detectionLogic: MRI ordered for patient with non-conditional CIED without pathway clarified
gaps.name: CIED MRI-conditional vs non-conditional identification gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Primary prevention ICD without documented driving restrictions counsel
gaps.name: Primary prevention ICD lifestyle/driving counseling

gaps.detectionLogic: Palliative care + active ICD without shock therapy deactivation discussion
gaps.name: CIED at EOL: deactivation discussion

gaps.detectionLogic: Pocket infection without full system extraction
gaps.name: Post-CIED infection: full system extraction

gaps.detectionLogic: Primary prevention ICD candidate age<50 without pacing need - S-ICD
gaps.name: S-ICD candidate (young, no pacing need)

gaps.detectionLogic: Device interrogation shows lead impedance anomaly without follow-up
gaps.name: CIED lead failure pattern detection

gaps.detectionLogic: On amiodarone without TSH in past 6 months
gaps.name: Amiodarone: TSH overdue

gaps.detectionLogic: On amiodarone without AST/ALT in past 6 months
gaps.name: Amiodarone: LFT overdue

gaps.detectionLogic: Starting amiodarone without baseline PFT or CXR
gaps.name: Amiodarone: baseline PFT/CXR gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Permanent AF or severe HF + dronedarone
gaps.name: Dronedarone: contraindicated in permanent AF or NYHA III-IV (SAFETY)

gaps.detectionLogic: Sotalol started outpatient without documented inpatient telemetry
gaps.name: Sotalol initiation: inpatient QT monitoring gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Dofetilide without inpatient QT protocol
gaps.name: Dofetilide initiation: mandatory inpatient protocol

gaps.detectionLogic: Flecainide or propafenone + CAD or structural heart disease
gaps.name: Flecainide/propafenone in structural heart disease (SAFETY)

gaps.detectionLogic: ICD with appropriate shock alerts requiring programming optimization
gaps.name: Inappropriate ICD shocks evaluation

gaps.detectionLogic: R55 syncope dx without ECG in encounter
gaps.name: Syncope without ECG documented

gaps.detectionLogic: Exertional syncope without echo + exercise testing
gaps.name: Exertional syncope: structural workup gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Syncope + significant LVH or LVEF<35 without ICD risk assessment
gaps.name: Syncope + structural heart disease: ICD eval

gaps.detectionLogic: OH + antihypertensive/alpha-blocker without med reconciliation
gaps.name: Orthostatic hypotension: med review gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Orthostatic symptoms + HR rise>30 without POTS workup
gaps.name: POTS diagnostic gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Unexplained syncope age>=60 without carotid sinus massage
gaps.name: Carotid sinus hypersensitivity: CSM documented

gaps.detectionLogic: Cardiac arrest survivor without TTM protocol documentation
gaps.name: Post-arrest: TTM not documented

gaps.detectionLogic: Post-arrest neuroprognostication before 72h
gaps.name: Post-arrest: neurological prognostication timing

gaps.name: Post-arrest: coronary angiography appropriate use
